Class OrderControllerImpl

java.lang.Object
com.wealthpro.orderexecution.controller.OrderControllerImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
OrderController
@RestController @RequestMapping("api") public class OrderControllerImpl extends Object implements OrderController
REST controller implementation for OrderController.

Delegates all business logic to OrderService. No Swagger annotations here — those live exclusively on the interface.

Version:
2.0
Author:
WealthPro Team
